inline_comments.message:
Looking at the verify job https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ci-management.git;a=blob;f=jjb/doc/doc-templates-rtd.yaml;h=884c3706b81a344b236a98bb9a127df45feb83c5;hb=HEAD scm section at line 38 and builder section at line 58, I am not sure of the interaction of a git submodule update after the patch has been overlayed on top of current master and submodule master(s). 

It took a while to test the current verify job for all cases and/or to find current information about the jjb being used for ONAP.  Depth 1 local is useful for local test, but less important in the CI/CD environment and may have some downside depending on how submodules are used.

Can you make this change by:
- copying the current [testenv:docs] section leaving it and the default envlist environment to run in jenkins unchanged.   

- In the copied section change the name to something like [testenv:local] and make the proposed changes for submodule update.

- Change the documentation instructions that I referenced on patch 1 to show how to use tox -elocal?
